articles.title: SRA to require advance notice of law firm M&A deals
articles.summary:
Law firms will have to notify the Solicitors Regulation Authority after signing heads of terms on a merger or acquisition, the regulator has proposed.
The post SRA to require advance notice of law firm M&A deals appeared first on Legal Futures.

articles.title: Clio Launches Two AI Initiatives: Free Tools for Florida Lawyers and a Pledge to Train 25,000 Professionals
articles.summary: In two separate announcements this week, Clio rolled out two initiatives aimed at the same problem — getting practicing lawyers comfortable with AI. articles.title: BlackBoiler Launches Veris, Pairing Its Deterministic Redlining With Generative AI in Microsoft Word
articles.summary: BlackBoiler, a company that has spent over a decade building automated redlining technology, this week launched Veris, a new platform that takes its original deterministic editing engine and supercharges it with generative AI and an agentic, chat-based interface. Running directly inside a Microsoft Word add-in, Veris allows contract-review teams to negotiate and mark up agreements […]
